item.title: Mercedes Benz L series V2.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

Mercedes Benz L series V2.0 ETS2

What is the L-series V2 Mod?
The Mercedes-Benz L-series V2 is a popular mod that brings the classic, vintage feel of the iconic Mercedes-Benz “L-series” trucks into the world of ETS2. It’s an upgrade or a new version of a previous mod, offering more features, better textures, and improved compatibility.

Unlike the modern Actros or Arocs, the L-series truck has a very distinct, old-school design, which appeals to players who enjoy driving classic and retro vehicles. The “V2” in the name usually indicates that the mod has been significantly updated with new parts and bug fixes.

Key Features of the Mod
Detailed Models: The mod typically includes highly detailed 3D models of the truck’s exterior and interior, including the dashboard and gauges.
Multiple Configurations: It often provides various chassis options (4×2, 6×4), different engine and transmission choices, and a range of accessories.
Customization: Players can usually customize the truck with different paint jobs, cabins, exhausts, and other tuning parts.
Engine Sounds: Good quality versions of the mod come with realistic engine sounds that are specific to the L-series trucks, enhancing the immersion.

Credits: CBJR

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

Mercedes Benz L series V2.0 ETS2

What is the L-series V2 Mod?
The Mercedes-Benz L-series V2 is a popular mod that brings the classic, vintage feel of the iconic Mercedes-Benz “L-series” trucks into the world of ETS2. It’s an upgrade or a new version of a previous mod, offering more features, better textures, and improved compatibility.

Unlike the modern Actros or Arocs, the L-series truck has a very distinct, old-school design, which appeals to players who enjoy driving classic and retro vehicles. The “V2” in the name usually indicates that the mod has been significantly updated with new parts and bug fixes.

Key Features of the Mod
Detailed Models: The mod typically includes highly detailed 3D models of the truck’s exterior and interior, including the dashboard and gauges.
Multiple Configurations: It often provides various chassis options (4×2, 6×4), different engine and transmission choices, and a range of accessories.
Customization: Players can usually customize the truck with different paint jobs, cabins, exhausts, and other tuning parts.
Engine Sounds: Good quality versions of the mod come with realistic engine sounds that are specific to the L-series trucks, enhancing the immersion.

Credits: CBJR

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: BXP PM Tunisia 159.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

BXP PM Tunisia 159.0 ETS2

ProMods Maghreb map add-on adaptation of Afromap
CONTAINS: expansion of Tunisia northern and central parts
FEATURES: road connections to Maghreb and fixed license plates
COMPLETED: compatibility adaptation of Afromap 2019 bug-free
INCOMPLETE: nothing reported
DEPENDENCY: ProMods Maghreb

Credits: BXP

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Marcopolo G6 1550 LD Multichassis V3.0 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

Marcopolo G6 1550 LD Multichassis V3.0 ETS2

Marcopolo G6 1550 LD – this modification adds a high quality passenger bus model with own interior and passengers for ETS2 players. This stunning coach is part of the iconic G6 series, known for its sleek design, advanced features, and superior performance on the road. The 1550 LD Multichassis takes this legacy forward with its impressive features and flawless design.

The extended front overhang adds to its overall length, giving it a unique and striking appearance. The body is made of high-quality materials, ensuring durability and strength. The aerodynamic design of the coach reduces wind resistance, making it fuel-efficient and environmentally friendly.

Features Marcopolo G6 1550 LD:
– Independent bus model
– High quality 3D model
– High quality detailed exterior
– High quality detailed interior
– the model has own interior
– the model has own sound
– the model has own wheels
– the model has passangers seats
– present the illumination of arrow speedometer and tachometer
– the character is correctly sitting in the driver’s seat

Credits: Norman Rodrigues

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

Marcopolo G6 1550 LD Multichassis V3.0 ETS2

Marcopolo G6 1550 LD – this modification adds a high quality passenger bus model with own interior and passengers for ETS2 players. This stunning coach is part of the iconic G6 series, known for its sleek design, advanced features, and superior performance on the road. The 1550 LD Multichassis takes this legacy forward with its impressive features and flawless design.

The extended front overhang adds to its overall length, giving it a unique and striking appearance. The body is made of high-quality materials, ensuring durability and strength. The aerodynamic design of the coach reduces wind resistance, making it fuel-efficient and environmentally friendly.

Features Marcopolo G6 1550 LD:
– Independent bus model
– High quality 3D model
– High quality detailed exterior
– High quality detailed interior
– the model has own interior
– the model has own sound
– the model has own wheels
– the model has passangers seats
– present the illumination of arrow speedometer and tachometer
– the character is correctly sitting in the driver’s seat

Credits: Norman Rodrigues

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Tuned Truck Traffic Pack by Trafficmaniac v3.3.11 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

Tuned Truck Traffic Pack by Trafficmaniac v3.3.11 ATS

Pack adds in traffic tuned trucks.
All standalone.
Cables simulation.
Works on any maps.
Compatible with AI packs by Jazzycat.
For version 1.59.x

Version 3.3.11 – update for patch 1.59

Credits: Trafficmaniac

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Motorcycle Traffic Pack(ATS) by Jazzycat v6.5.13 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 16, 2026

Motorcycle Traffic Pack(ATS) by Jazzycat v6.5.13 ATS

Pack adds in traffic 93 motorcycles:
BMW S1000RR(’09, ’15), K1200S, HP2
Honda CB600 Hornet, CBR250R, CBR1000RR, Shadow RS, CB750F, PCX, Goldwing GL1500, Shadow Phantom, Interstate, Monkey 125, Forza 300, CRF1000L Africa Twin
Ducati 999, 1199, Monster 1200, XDiavel, Supersport, Multistrada, 848 Evo, Monster S4, Desmosedici RR, 1000SS, 1098, Diavel, Scrambler, Monster 695
Kawasaki Ninja 300, ZX-10R, ZX-12R, ZX-14R, Z800, Concours 14, VN2000 Vulcan, Z750, Z1000, VN900 Vulcan, KLX250
Triumph Speed Triple, Bonneville
Aprilia Tuono V4, RSV4, Dorsoduro
KTM 1290 Super Duke GT, 1190 RC8, 690 Duke, 1290 Super Adventure, 790 Duke
Husqvarna 701 Supermoto, Vitpilen 701
MBK Nitro
MV Agusta Brutale, F4
MZ Mastiff
Suzuki Hayabusa, GSX-R750, Boulevard M109R, RG250 Gamma
Yamaha FZ-10, YZF-R6, YZF-R1, YFZ-R3, Midnight Star, VMax, XMax, XJ6, Vino, XT660, FZ8
Benelli Tornado Naked Tre R160
Lauge Jensen Viking
Piaggio Vespa 946
Lightning LS218
Indian Chieftain
Harley Davidson Fat Boy Lo, FXSTC Softail Custom, Heritage Classic, Road Glide, FXSTB Softail Night Train, Iron 883, Night Rod Special

All standalone, works on any maps.
Compatible with all my packs.
For version 1.59.x
Included two versions: for use only with default traffic and for use with my AI pack.

You must have in the mod folder two files:
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_ats.scs
and
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_ats_def.scs (only with default traffic)
or
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_ats_jaz.scs (with my AI pack)

Version 6.5.13 – compatibility update for patch 1.59.x

Credits: Jazzycat

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.
